news.headline: Intel report warns large-scale war ‘unlikely’ to oust Iran’s regime
news.summary: A classified U.S. report doubts that Iran’s opposition would take power following either a short or extended U.S. military campaign.

news.headline: Seven-try Scotland stun France to end Les Bleus' Six Nations Grand Slam hopes
news.summary: Scotland scored seven tries to France's six in a thrilling 50-40 win at Murrayfield on Saturday, ending the defending champions' Grand Slam charge and ensuring the Six Nations title race goes to the final day.

news.headline: Opposition slams govt’s ‘inflation bomb’ after fuel price hike, demands reversal
news.summary: <p>The opposition on Saturday slammed the government’s <a href="https://www.dawn.com/news/1979341/petrol-bomb-falls-on-pakistan-amid-war">move to hike</a> petrol and diesel prices by Rs55 per litre, terming it an “inflation bomb” for the public and demanding its reversal.</p>

It would be his last.
